stemHtml: How can RNAV 1, RNAV 2 SID or STAR, RNP 1 and RNP 2 routes be modified by pilots?

options.a: By inserting or deleting waypoints in the database and/or obtaining a Rho-Theta Fix.
options.b: Manually, by inserting range and bearing to a new waypoint, in response to an ATC clearance.
options.c: By deleting waypoints and manually entries of latitude and longitude with ATC clearance.
options.d: Manually, by inserting or deleting waypoints, in response to an ATC clearance.
